creator: cummingsj@gmail.com
text:
More information, in terms of troubleshooting can be found here:
http://forums.freebsd.org/showthread.php?t=22648

The short of it is that I cannot seem to get any process (snort or
otherwise) to re-inject packets into an unnumbered if_bridge using
ipfw and divert sockets.

How-To-Repeat: Follow the steps outlined at http://forums.freebsd.org/showthread.php?t=22648
